Sylvelle

Your private companion for becoming your best self.

Style. Fitness. Confidence. Mindset. All on your device — encrypted, offline, no account needed. Free, always.

Get the App Join the Waitlist

Four pillars of growth

Everything Sylvelle coaches lives in one of these areas — and you choose which ones matter most to you.

Style & Beauty

Skincare, makeup, hair, wardrobe building, personal style. At your own pace, your own way.

Fitness & Wellness

Strength, mobility, posture, energy — framed around health and confidence, never weight-loss pressure.

Confidence & Social

Poise, vocal presence, conversation, charm, public-speaking confidence. Platonic and empowering.

Mindset & Life

Self-talk, emotional resilience, habits, journaling — plus career, finances, and productivity.

How it works

A structured daily loop that adapts to you — not the other way around.

01

Choose your coaching style

Pick a persona (Elegant Mentor, Warm Best Friend, Honest Coach, or Calm Wellness Guide) and an intensity from Gentle to Intense. Change any time.

02

Get a daily shelf of micro-tasks

Each day, Sylvelle surfaces a small, achievable set of concrete tasks chosen by your goals, your gaps, and spaced repetition for skills that take time.

03

Build a living routine

Lock your favourite tasks into a routine. Forgiving streaks mean one missed day is never a failure — the habit is what counts.

Why Sylvelle?

Private by design

No account, no server, no analytics. Everything is AES-256 encrypted on your device — a lock, a key, and nothing else.

Free forever

No subscriptions, no paywalls, no microtransactions. Donations are welcome but never required.

Offline first

Sylvelle works with zero internet. Your data is yours — no cloud dependency, ever.

Get Sylvelle

Available for Android. iOS is coming after launch.
